business.name: Mark Polsky Tree Service
business.tagline: The tree guy Philly calls first

hero.headline: *Same-day quotes* — tree work that actually happens
hero.subheadline: Popular enough that we're booked out, but worth the wait. Just ask the neighbors who've been through a Philly storm.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every tree situation handled
services_section.subheading: Removal, pruning, storm cleanup — we show up with the right equipment

services.title: Tree Removal
services.description: Mature trees, tight spaces, root rot problems. We'll even put your fence back when we're done.

services.title: Tree Pruning
services.description: Clean cuts that keep your trees healthy. No hacking, no guesswork.

services.title: Stump Grinding
services.description: Complete removal below ground level. Your yard, ready for whatever comes next.

services.title: Storm Damage Cleanup
services.description: When Philly weather hits hard, we're the crew that shows up to clean up the mess.

about.heading: Mark Polsky Tree Service
about.body: A Philadelphia tree service that answers the phone and shows up when promised. Real quotes, fair prices, work that's worth waiting for.

reviews.name: Risa C.
reviews.text: Mark came for a quote the same day I called. Responsive, helpful, and his price beat everyone else for tree removal.

reviews.name: Adam C.
reviews.text: Successfully removed a massive root-rotted tree from a tight spot. Even removed and replaced our fence. Great communication.

reviews.name: Ethan B.
reviews.text: Friendly, clear communication, professional work. Very competitive pricing for our extremely large beech tree removal.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Philadelphia and beyond
service_areas.subheading: Same crew, same quality work throughout the metro area

cta.heading: Ready to get that tree handled?
cta.body: Same-day quotes, fair prices, work that's actually worth waiting for. Call Mark and get it done right.
